disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases on expedition ship haven't impacted cruise sales or pricing - Travel Weekly
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases on expedition ship haven't impacted cruise sales or pricing Travel Weekly
updates.summary_zh: 探险船汉坦病例未影响邮轮销售或定价。

updates.title_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Mayday! SA scientists identified hantavirus outbreak in 24 hours The Times of India How South African scientists identified hantavirus on a cruise ship thousands of miles away AP News MV Hondius captain disembarks, no new hantavirus deaths reported news.cgtn.com

updates.summary_zh: 荷兰确认Hondius号船员新感染汉坦病毒并隔离。

updates.body_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria Times Colonist

updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官称无埃博拉及新增汉坦病例。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus update: Nebraska officials awaiting CDC guidance on passengers’ release WOWT
